scope: DM1 V1 spell failure feedback deterministic bridge/probe only

sourceAnchors.evidence: cast-click path calls F0412, clears Symbols[0], resets SymbolStep, redraws F0397/F0398 for every result except C3 needs-flask
meaningless, needs-practice, and needs-flask failures call F0410 with C01/C00/C10; C10 returns C3
line feed/champion-name prefix and English failure message branches
spell rows redrawn after F0408 clears non-flask cast results
C00/C01/C10/C11 failure constants and C0/C1/C3 cast result constants

implementation: include/dm1_v1_spell_casting_pc34_compat.h: DM1_SpellFailureFeedback metadata API and F0408 cleanup predicate
src/dm1/dm1_v1_spell_casting_pc34_compat.c: source-locked failure feedback table, cleanup helper, source evidence string, and C10 outFailure propagation
tests/test_dm1_v1_spell_casting_pc34_compat.c: focused deterministic probes for meaningless, needs-practice, and needs-flask feedback behavior
